sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Energy Fuels Appoints Ross Bhappu as New CEO
feed.summary: Energy Fuels Inc., a key U.S. producer of critical materials, has named Ross R. Bhappu as its new Chief Executive Officer. Bhappu's extensive industry background and strategic vision are expected to lead the company's expansion in uranium, rare earths, and other vital materials crucial for the clean energy transition. This appointment comes at a pivotal time as Energy Fuels aims to strengthen its leadership in the sector.

feed.title: 2026 State of Healthcare Supply Chain IT: 75 page e-Book
feed.summary: Black Book Research's new 75-page e-book, "The State of Healthcare Supply Chain Technology 2026," reveals that healthcare supply chain is a critical board-level margin-control issue, not just a back-office function. The report, based on a survey of 1,335 healthcare supply chain professionals, highlights weak visibility, slow substitute approvals, and manual workflows as major factors eroding margins and continuity of care. It identifies control towers, workflow orchestration, and connected supply chain IT as essential solutions, indicating a significant replacement cycle for supply chain applications is underway to address these challenges.

feed.title: Deep losses and new capital in LQR House (Nasdaq: YHC) 2025 annual report
feed.summary: LQR House Inc. (NASDAQ: YHC) reported a net loss of $25.5 million in its 2025 annual report, prompting its auditor to express substantial doubt about the company's ability to continue as a going concern. The company raised significant capital throughout 2025 from stock programs and warrant exercises to fund operations and settle prior litigation. LQR House also announced a large acquisition agreement for Fusion Five Continents Securities Limited, a securities brokerage firm, indicating a strategic diversification despite ongoing financial challenges.

feed.title: XPeng GX Pre-sale Starts at RMB0.3998M; He Xiaopeng Says No Plans to Enter Home Appliance Sector
feed.summary: XPeng (09868.HK) has launched the pre-sale of its new full-size flagship SUV, the XPeng GX, with both pure electric and extended-range variants starting at RMB399,800. This model is built on XPENG-W's SEPA 3.0 physical AI technology architecture, incorporating advanced technologies like Robotaxi intelligent driving and flying car safety redundancy. Chairman He Xiaopeng stated that the company currently has no plans to expand into the home appliance sector, citing the existing challenges of building cars.

feed.title: Rogers Satellite coverage expands to U.S. through T-Mobile partnership
feed.summary: Rogers Communications Inc. is partnering with T-Mobile to expand its satellite-to-mobile coverage into the United States. This collaboration, using Elon Musk's Starlink technology, will enable Rogers' customers to make app-based calls, send texts, and use certain applications while roaming in the U.S. outside of cellular network range. The service will be included at no extra cost for customers on certain Rogers plans with U.S. coverage.

feed.title: Abbott Stock Tumbles on Earnings. Nutrition Business Is Struggling and Merger Costs Biting.
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories reported first-quarter earnings that slightly exceeded analyst expectations, but its shares fell. This decline was attributed to persistent struggles in its nutrition business and the anticipated dilutive impact of its acquisition of Exact Sciences on full-year earnings.

feed.title: Modular Medical Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Requirement
feed.summary: Modular Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ:MODD) announced it has regained compliance with the Nasdaq Capital Market's minimum bid price requirement. The company received a letter from Nasdaq confirming that its common stock maintained a closing bid price above $1.00 for ten consecutive trading days as of April 14, 2026. This resolves the previous non-compliance issue regarding Nasdaq Marketplace Rule 5550(a)(2).

feed.title: Travelers begins 2026 with $1.7bn profit surge on lower cat losses
feed.summary: Travelers Companies, Inc. reported a significant surge in net income to $1.711 billion in Q1 2026, up from $395 million in Q1 2025. This substantial increase was primarily attributed to lower catastrophe losses and higher net investment income. The company's combined ratio improved to 88.6%, and it announced a 14% increase in its quarterly cash dividend, marking 22 consecutive years of dividend increases.

feed.title: Union Pacific to post Q1 results April 23, webcast at 8:45 ET
feed.summary: Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial and operating results on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 7:45 a.m. ET. A conference call and live webcast hosted by the management team will follow at 8:45 a.m. ET. Interested parties can access the webcast and materials via the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Cisco’s Real Stakes: Digitally Aiding and Abetting
authors: Harold Hongju Koh – Yale Law School
feed.summary: This article discusses the upcoming U.S. Supreme Court case, Cisco Systems v. Doe I et al., which addresses whether a U.S. company and its CEO can be sued under the Alien Tort Statute (ATS) and Torture Victim Protection Act (TVPA) for aiding and abetting torture in China. The author argues for affirming the Ninth Circuit's decision or dismissing certiorari, emphasizing that existing precedent supports holding companies accountable for knowingly assisting human rights abuses, especially concerning digital surveillance technologies. The article also touches upon the broader implications of this case, including the role of U.S. technology companies in enabling governmental repression and the need for accountability to prevent the U.S. from becoming a safe harbor for digital abusers.

feed.title: Bio-Techne Introduces Streamlined Brand Architecture to Help Customers Navigate Solutions Faster and With Greater Clarity
feed.summary: Bio-Techne Corporation has unveiled a streamlined brand architecture, organizing its technologies into three distinct portfolio brands: R&D Systems™, Bio-Techne Spatial™, and Bio-Techne Diagnostics™. This new structure aims to simplify product navigation for scientists and clinicians by aligning solutions with the progression of scientific research from early discovery to clinical diagnostics. The company will debut this updated branding at the AACR Annual Meeting 2026 and AAI's IMMUNOLOGY 2026™ to enhance customer experience and accelerate scientific progress.

feed.title: Pursuit Wealth Management LLC Purchases Shares of 6,973 The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX
feed.summary: Pursuit Wealth Management LLC has acquired 6,973 shares of The TJX Companies, valued at approximately $1,071,000, during the fourth quarter. This comes as TJX reported strong Q4 results, beating EPS estimates and raising its quarterly dividend. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for TJX with a consensus price target near $167.55, despite a recent insider sale by CEO Ernie Herrman.

feed.title: Revvity to Present at Upcoming Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Revvity, Inc. (NYSE: RVTY) announced it will present at the BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference on May 13, 2026, and the Goldman Sachs 47th Annual Global Healthcare Conference on June 9, 2026. Company representatives, including senior vice president Steve Willoughby and CEO Prahlad Singh, will provide updates on the company and its strategic priorities. Live webcasts and replays of the presentations will be available on Revvity's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories Schedules First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE: CRL) announced its first-quarter 2026 financial results will be released on Thursday, May 7th, before market opening. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. ET. Investors can access a live webcast and replay of the call through the Investor Relations section of the company's website.

feed.title: Strid Group LLC Takes $1.03 Million Position in Philip Morris International Inc. $PM
feed.summary: Strid Group LLC recently acquired a new position in Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE:PM), purchasing 6,444 shares valued at approximately $1.03 million during the fourth quarter. This move aligns with increased institutional ownership in PM, which stands at 78.63%, with several funds adding to their stakes. Despite a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts with a $195.72 price target, the company faces mixed sentiment due to upcoming Q1 results and recent insider sales by its CEO and CFO.

feed.title: Moody’s puts AI credit memo workflow in AWS software marketplace
feed.summary: Moody's Corporation has made its AI-powered Credit Memo workflow available in AWS Marketplace, aiming to integrate its decision-grade intelligence directly into credit workflows for financial institutions. This solution, part of Moody's Agentic Solutions (MAS), automates and standardizes the creation of credit memos, leveraging Moody's proprietary data and risk insights. The move is intended to help customers accelerate decision-making while maintaining rigor and transparency, particularly in regulated environments.

feed.title: Pursuit Wealth Management LLC Invests $1.05 Million in Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT
feed.summary: Pursuit Wealth Management LLC initiated a new position in Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE:LMT) during the fourth quarter, acquiring 2,176 shares valued at approximately $1.05 million. This investment comes as Lockheed Martin navigates recent contract wins and an increase in its venture fund, despite missing Q4 EPS estimates. Institutional investors now hold 74.19% of the company, and analysts generally rate the stock as a "Hold" with an average price target of $645.79.

feed.title: 322 straight quarters of dividends: Alliant sets May 15 payout
feed.summary: Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.5350 per share, payable on May 15, 2026, to shareowners of record as of April 30, 2026. The company has a long history of dividends, having paid them for 322 consecutive quarters since 1946, and is recognized as a member of the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats Index. Alliant Energy provides regulated energy services to approximately 1,010,000 electric and 435,000 natural gas customers across Iowa and Wisconsin.

feed.title: Banks overhaul core systems, and FIS tops Everest's 2026 ranking
feed.summary: FIS has been ranked #1 in Everest Group's Top 50™ Core Banking Technology Providers 2026 report for the second consecutive year. The report highlights FIS's leadership in core banking modernization, emphasizing modular architectures, AI-led automation, and cloud-native platforms. FIS’s success is attributed to its ability to guide financial institutions through technological transformations and its commitment to embedding agentic AI capabilities across its banking platforms.

feed.title: SUIT UP AND SCORE: CHIPOTLE BRINGS BACK ITS HOCKEY JERSEY BOGO FOR THE 2026 STANLEY CUP® PLAYOFFS--AND DROPS FIRST-EVER LIMITED-EDITION JERSEY
feed.summary: Chipotle is bringing back its popular Hockey Jersey BOGO promotion for the sixth consecutive year on April 20, 2026, where fans wearing a hockey jersey can get a buy-one-get-one entrée after 3 p.m. local time. For the first time, Chipotle is also releasing a limited-edition hockey jersey, with only 75 available through the Chipotle Rewards Exchange. This initiative reinforces Chipotle's ongoing partnership with the NHL and NHLPA and its commitment to supporting the hockey community at various levels.

feed.title: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Autoliv, CoreWeave, Corning, Dicks Sporting Goods, Federated Hermes, Gitlab, PayPal, Pfizer, Okta, and More
feed.summary: This article details Thursday's top Wall Street analyst research calls, including upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for various companies like Autoliv, Okta, Corning, and PayPal. It also provides a market summary from Wednesday, highlighting record highs for the Nasdaq and S&P 500, with commentary on pre-market stock futures, bond markets, oil, gas, gold, and cryptocurrency trends. The positive market performance is mainly attributed to improving global conflict metrics and strong Q1 earnings from major banks.

feed.title: EPETWATER Places Initial Multi-Truckload Gallon-Sized Private-Label Production Order with Greene Concepts
feed.summary: EPETWATER has placed an initial multi-truckload commercial private-label production order for gallon-sized pet water products with Greene Concepts, Inc. Greene Concepts will produce pet water under the Sport Dog label. This partnership validates Greene Concepts' co-packing and private-label manufacturing capabilities and expands its presence in the growing pet hydration and wellness category.

feed.title: Schwab Earnings Jump 30% on Rush of Trading Activity
feed.summary: Charles Schwab reported a 30% increase in first-quarter net income, reaching $2.48 billion, driven by heightened client trading activity and volatile financial markets. Revenue climbed 16% year-over-year, largely due to a 20% jump in trading revenue and an increase in net interest income. The brokerage saw a record 9.9 million daily average trades in February, and client assets grew to $11.8 trillion.

feed.title: Want AI to Pay Off? Invest in Data and People, Gartner Says
feed.summary: Gartner advises that for AI initiatives to be successful, organizations must invest significantly in foundational areas like data quality, governance, AI-ready personnel, and change management. Despite this, a global survey revealed that a minority of technology leaders are confident in the positive financial impact of their current AI investments. The report outlines six key shifts for data and analytics (D&A) leaders to achieve AI value, emphasizing trusted data, human-agent collaboration, context as critical infrastructure, scaled engineering practices, trust-based governance, and moving beyond ROI to value compounding.

feed.title: KeyCorp trades lower despite Q1 beat as net interest margin falls short of expectations (KEY:NYSE)
feed.summary: KeyCorp's stock traded lower despite beating first-quarter earnings estimates, as its net interest margin fell short of consensus expectations. The company reported GAAP EPS of $0.44, exceeding estimates by $0.03, and revenue of $1.95 billion, beating by $10 million, representing a 10.2% year-over-year increase. Shares dropped 1.44% to $21.26 in pre-market trading following the news.

feed.title: Schwab Assets Top Estimates as Clients Put More Money in Market
feed.summary: Charles Schwab Corp. exceeded first-quarter asset estimates, drawing in $139.9 billion in net new assets, a 5.7% increase from the previous year, surpassing analyst predictions of $123.5 billion. The brokerage also reported net income of $2.48 billion, slightly above the $2.46 billion forecast, demonstrating its continued ability to attract retail investor wealth despite global uncertainties.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) Reports Q1 CY2026 In Line With Expectations
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) reported its Q1 CY2026 earnings, meeting Wall Street's revenue expectations with a 4.7% year-on-year increase to $7.29 billion, and itsGAAP profit of $1.18 per share surpassed analyst estimates by 3.3%. The company's net interest margin and tangible book value per share slightly missed forecasts, resulting in a mixed quarter. Despite the mixed results, the stock remained flat immediately following the announcement at $56.49.

feed.title: KeyCorp’s (NYSE:KEY) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates
feed.summary: KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) reported better-than-expected Q1 CY2026 results, with sales up 10.2% year-on-year to $1.95 billion, surpassing Wall Street's revenue estimates. The company's non-GAAP profit of $0.44 per share also beat analyst consensus, despite its tangible book value per share missing estimates. Overall, the quarter was considered mixed by investors, with shares trading down slightly following the announcement.

feed.title: ProShares Ultra FTSE China 50 Trade Ideas — AMEX:XPP
feed.summary: This article provides trade ideas for the ProShares Ultra FTSE China 50 ETF (AMEX:XPP), noting its composition of 50 large, liquid Chinese stocks. One specific trade idea suggests the ETF is oversold, highlighted by unusual trading volume. The article also includes performance metrics such as 52-week low and high percentages and year-to-date performance.

feed.title: Free cash flow of Western Asset Premier Bond Fund – NASDAQ:XWEAX
feed.summary: This page focuses on the free cash flow for Western Asset Premier Bond Fund, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol XWEAX. Although specific financial data is not displayed, the article indicates that this information, along with other financial metrics, can be accessed through the platform. It provides an overview of the fund within the context of market data and financial tools available on TradingView.

feed.title: Vera Bradley outlet sale canceled for 2026 to make way for reimagined experience
feed.summary: Vera Bradley has canceled its traditional annual outlet sale for 2026, opting instead for a "reimagined experience" to replace the popular event. No specific details about the nature of this new experience have been released yet.

feed.title: Netflix, Zoom, Apollo Global And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: CNBC's 'Final Trades' segment highlighted several stocks, with analysts making recommendations. Netflix (NFLX) was chosen ahead of its Q1 earnings report, while Zoom Communications (ZM) and Apollo Global Management (APO) also received endorsements. Additionally, Invesco QQQ Trust (QQQ) was mentioned as a final trade.

feed.title: DA Davidson Raises Price Target on PNC Financial Services Group to $247 From $242, Keeps Buy/Add Rating
feed.summary: DA Davidson has increased its price target for PNC Financial Services Group (PNC) to $247 from $242, while maintaining a Buy/Add rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects continued positive sentiment from analysts towards the company. Several other firms, including Piper Sandler, Barclays, and Goldman Sachs, have also recently updated their price targets for PNC.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (SCHW) The Charles Schwab Corporation Posts Q1 Adjusted EPS $1.43 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $1.40
feed.summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation reported Q1 adjusted EPS of $1.43 per share, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $1.40. This financial result indicates stronger-than-expected earnings for the brokerage and banking services company. The news highlights the company's performance against analyst expectations.

feed.title: Ally Financial Inc. (NYSE:ALLY) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $0.30
feed.summary: Ally Financial Inc. announced a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share, payable on May 15th to shareholders of record on May 1st. This dividend represents an annualized yield of 2.8% and is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 22.1%. The company recently exceeded Q4 earnings estimates and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $53.29.

feed.title: Antero Midstream Corporation (NYSE:AM) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $0.23
feed.summary: Antero Midstream Corporation (NYSE:AM) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.225 per share, payable on May 13th to shareholders of record on April 29th. The dividend yields approximately 4.2% annually, though its coverage is noted as potentially at risk with an 81.8% payout ratio and a recent EPS miss. Despite insider selling, institutional investors hold a significant portion of the company's stock.

feed.title: Aligos Therapeutics Enters into Exclusive License Deal with Xiamen Amoytop Biotech Co., Ltd. to Develop and Commercialize Pevifoscorvir Sodium in Greater China for Chronic Hepatitis B Virus Infection
feed.summary: Aligos Therapeutics has announced an exclusive license agreement with Xiamen Amoytop Biotech Co., Ltd. for the development and commercialization of pevifoscorvir sodium in Greater China to treat chronic hepatitis B virus infection. Aligos will receive an upfront payment of $25 million USD and is eligible for up to $420 million USD in milestones, plus tiered royalties. This partnership leverages Amoytop's strong presence in the Chinese hepatology market, aiming to accelerate the development and regulatory success of pevifoscorvir sodium in a region with over 90 million people living with HBV.

feed.title: Progressive Corp. (PGR) PT Raised to $221 at BMO Capital
feed.summary: BMO Capital analyst Michael Zaremski has increased the price target for Progressive Corp. (PGR) to $221. This article is a premium-only piece, requiring a subscription to StreetInsider.com to read the full details. The update was made on April 16, 2026.

feed.title: Abbott Reports First-Quarter 2026 Results; Updates Guidance to Reflect Acquisition of Exact Sciences
feed.summary: Abbott announced its first-quarter 2026 financial results, with sales increasing 7.8 percent on a reported basis and 3.7 percent on a comparable basis, and adjusted diluted EPS of $1.15. The company also updated its full-year 2026 guidance to reflect the recent acquisition of Exact Sciences, projecting comparable sales growth of 6.5% to 7.5% and adjusted diluted EPS of $5.38 to $5.58. This acquisition establishes Abbott as a leader in the oncology diagnostics market, further strengthening its growth prospects.

feed.title: Abbott first-quarter results beat on cancer diagnostics, medical device strength
feed.summary: Abbott marginally beat Wall Street's first-quarter profit and revenue estimates, driven by its new cancer diagnostics business and strong medical device unit performance. Despite this, the company's shares fell 2% after it announced a 20-cent hit to its 2026 profit forecast due to the $23 billion acquisition of Exact Sciences. CEO Robert Ford stated that the acquisition still adds a high-growth business to Abbott's portfolio.

feed.title: Woori Financial Group Reviews Potential Tongyang and ABL Life Integration
feed.summary: Woori Financial Group is considering the integration of Tongyang Life Insurance Co., Ltd. and ABL Life Insurance Co., Ltd., potentially making Tongyang Life Insurance a wholly owned subsidiary. These moves aim to strengthen Woori's competitiveness in the insurance sector, though no final decisions have been made. The company has committed to providing further updates within three months.

feed.title: Global chip revenue to exceed $1.3 trillion in 2026: Gartner forecast
feed.summary: Gartner forecasts global semiconductor revenue to surpass $1.3 trillion in 2026, marking the highest growth in two decades, driven by strong demand for AI processing and "memflation." Memory revenue is expected to increase threefold, with DRAM and NAND flash prices rising significantly, though this "memflation" may delay non-AI demand. AI semiconductors are projected to represent 30% of total revenue, fueled by hyperscaler investments in AI infrastructure.

feed.title: Aehr Receives Record $41 Million Production Order from Lead Hyperscale AI Customer; Second-Half Bookings Exceed $92 Million
feed.summary: Aehr Test Systems announced a record $41 million follow-on production order from its lead hyperscale customer for package-level burn-in of custom AI processor ASICs, bringing its second-half fiscal year bookings to over $92 million. This order validates the Sonoma platform for high-volume burn-in of AI processor ASICs, and the company projects further demand as customers develop higher-power AI accelerators. Aehr has also expanded its production capacity to meet growing demand across various markets including AI, silicon photonics, and silicon carbide.

feed.title: Abbott Labs' Q1 sales up 7.8% to $11.16B
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories announced a strong start to the year with its first-quarter sales rising by 7.8% to $11.16 billion. This positive financial performance indicates robust growth for the company during the initial months of the fiscal year.

feed.title: $41M AI chip order pushes Aehr's half-year bookings past $92M
feed.summary: Aehr Test Systems (NASDAQ: AEHR) received a record $41 million production order from its lead hyperscale AI customer for package-level burn-in of custom AI processor ASICs. This order pushes Aehr's second-half bookings past $92 million, significantly exceeding prior expectations of $60-$80 million. Deliveries for this order are expected to begin in fiscal 2027, starting June 27, 2026, and the company has also expanded its manufacturing capacity to support this growing demand.

feed.title: Xilio brings in a 30-year biotech veteran as board member
feed.summary: Xilio Therapeutics (Nasdaq: XLO) has appointed Cheryl R. Blanchard, Ph.D., a biotech veteran with over 30 years of experience, to its board of directors, effective April 16, 2026. Dr. Blanchard's expertise in biologics, devices, and commercial strategy, including her current role as executive chair of Anika, is expected to support Xilio's masked immuno-oncology pipeline. This appointment follows the departure of Christina Rossi from the board on April 15, 2026.

feed.title: Starbucks Sells Coffee in ChatGPT: AI Immersive Ordering, Can It Drive the Stock Price?
feed.summary: Starbucks recently integrated ordering capabilities within ChatGPT, allowing users to select coffee based on mood before being redirected to the app to complete the purchase. This strategy addresses income statement pressures by leveraging AI to reduce operational costs through its "Green Apron Assistant" and improve customer acquisition efficiency. While the stock has seen modest gains, its future performance hinges on the AI initiatives effectively impacting profitability and customer acquisition amidst challenges like technical costs, data integration complexities, and the sustainability of AI-driven advantages.

feed.title: Waton Financial Marks One Year as a Listed Company with MOTA: A New Chapter in Human-AI Investment Collaboration
feed.summary: Waton Financial (NASDAQ: WTF) celebrates its first anniversary as a listed company by introducing MOTA (Manager of Trading Agents), a platform designed for human-AI investment collaboration. Unlike other AI trading tools, MOTA focuses on regulated infrastructure, embedded compliance, and human oversight, emphasizing that AI suggests while humans decide. The company positions MOTA to address the missing conversation around licensing and accountability in the AI trading industry, aligning with evolving global AI regulations.

feed.title: Caesars taps into new MLB season with player image licensing deal
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment has secured a multi-year licensing deal with MLB Players, Inc., allowing Caesars Sportsbook and William Hill Nevada to use MLB player imagery in their marketing efforts. This agreement aims to enhance fan engagement by featuring actual players in their mobile apps and retail locations. The new MLB season began on March 25, and Caesars Entertainment Inc. (NASDAQ:CZR) shares saw a gain following the news.

feed.title: Nations Financial Group Inc. IA ADV Acquires 2,598 Shares of Quanta Services, Inc. $PWR
feed.summary: Nations Financial Group Inc. IA ADV has increased its stake in Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) by 41.9%, acquiring an additional 2,598 shares to own a total of 8,803 shares valued at approximately $3.716 million. Quanta Services reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from Wall Street analysts with an average price target of $595.50. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.11 per share.
